sectiondef.header: Please define XPRC_DEBUG macro to get debug prints of the driver and

description.para: define XPRC_DEBUG_CORE to get debug prints of the core.

briefdescription.para: Maximum Number Of Vsms.
Number Of General registers.
Registers per Trigger.
Registers per Rm.
Registers per Bs.
Virtual Socket In Full State.
Virtual Socket In Empty State.
Byte field Information for Control register Commands.
Halfword field information for Control register Commands.
Vsm In Shutdown State.
Vsm not In Shutdown State.
Software Trigger is Pending.
Software Trigger is not Pending.
Maximum Number of Reset duration.
Register Table Row.
Fifo Value for Lutram.
Fifo Value for Blockram.
This macro is used to get the Number of Virtual Socket Managers.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.

briefdescription.para: This macro is used to find if Clearing Bitstreams are required.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.

simplesect.para: 0 if Clearing Bitstreams are not required, 1 if they are.
Clearing Bitstreams are only required when the device being managed is an UltraScale device.

briefdescription.para: This macro is used to get the CAP Arbitration protocol.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.

simplesect.para: Returns the value of the CAP arbitration protocol.

briefdescription.para: This macro is used to discover if the AXI4-Lite register interface is enabled or disabled.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.

simplesect.para: Returns a value when AXI4-Lite interface is enabled or disabled.
This interface must be enabled for the driver to function.

briefdescription.para: This macro is used to discover if the core's reset is active low (0) or active high (1).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.

simplesect.para: 1 if the core's reset is active high, 0 if it's active low.

briefdescription.para: This macro returns the depth of FIFO in the fetch path.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.

briefdescription.para: This macro returns the type of the FIFO in the fetch path.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.

simplesect.para:
Returns
CP_FIFO_TYPE_LUTRAM for Lutram type
CP_FIFO_TYPE_BLOCKRAM for blockram type

briefdescription.para: This macro returns the family type of the device being managed.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.

simplesect.para: Returns 7, 8 or 9 for 7 Series, Ultrascale and UltraScale+.

briefdescription.para: This macro returns the number of synchronization stages used when crossing between clock domains.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.

simplesect.para: Returns the number of CDC stages.

briefdescription.para: This macro tells the PRC whether partial bitstreams are compressed or not.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.

simplesect.para: Returns 0 if PRC is same as before. Returns 1 if decompression block is added to hardware.

briefdescription.para: This macro is used to get the Virtual Socket Manager Select MSB.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.

briefdescription.para: This macro is used to get the Virtual Socket Manager Select LSB.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.

briefdescription.para: This macro is used to get the Bank Select MSB.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.

briefdescription.para: This macro is used to get the Bank Select LSB.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.

briefdescription.para: This macro is used to get the Register Select MSB.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.

briefdescription.para: This macro is used to get the Register Select LSB.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.

briefdescription.para: This macro is used to get the number of Reconfigurable Modules in a VSM.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.

simplesect.para: The number of RMs that this VSM has.

briefdescription.para: This macro returns the number of Reconfigurable Modules that have been allocated in this VSM.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.

simplesect.para: Number of RMs allocated in the VSM.

briefdescription.para: This macro returns if the VSM starts in the Shutdown state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.

simplesect.para: 1 if the VSM starts in Shutdown State, 0 if it starts in the active state.

briefdescription.para: This macro returns the number of triggers that the Virtual Socket Manager has.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.

simplesect.para: Number of triggers allocated in the Virtual Socket Manager.

briefdescription.para: This macro returns whether the VSM will enter the shutdown state if an error is detected.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.

simplesect.para: Returns 1 if the VSM will enter the shutdown state on an error, 0 if it doesn't.

briefdescription.para: This macro returns whether the VSM contains an RM in the initial configuration bitstream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.

simplesect.para: Returns 1 if the VSM has an RM in the initial bitstream and 0 if it doesn't.
This will always return 1 when the device being managed is an UltraScale device.

briefdescription.para: This macro returns the RM in the initial configuration bitstream for this VSM.

detaileddescription.para: The returned value is only valid if XPrc_GetHasPorRm() returns 1 for this VSM.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.

briefdescription.para: This macro returns 1 if the AXI4-Stream Status Channel is enabled for this VSM, and 0 if it's disabled.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.

simplesect.para: Returns 1 when the AXI4-Stream Status channel is enabled and 0 when it is disabled.

briefdescription.para: This macro returns 1 if the AXI4-Stream Control Channel is enabled for this VSM, and 0 if it's disabled.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.

simplesect.para: Returns 1 when the AXI4-Stream Control channel is enabled and 0 when it is disabled.

briefdescription.para: This macro returns whether the VSM will skip the Reconfigurable Module startup steps after a reset.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.

simplesect.para: Returns 1 when the RM startup steps are skipped, and 0 when they aren't.

briefdescription.para: This macro returns the number of hardware triggers that the VSM has.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.

simplesect.para: Returns the number of hardware triggers.

briefdescription.para: This function Looks for the device configuration based on the unique device ID.

detaileddescription.para: The table XPrc_ConfigTable[] contains the configuration information for each device in the system.

parameterdescription.para: is the unique device ID of the device being looked up.

simplesect.para: A pointer to the configuration table entry corresponding to the given device ID, or NULL if no match was found.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes a PRC instance.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
points to the XPrc device configuration structure.
is the device base address in the virtual memory address space. If the address translation is not used then the physical address should be passed.

inbodydescription.para: Set some default values for instance data, don't indicate the device is ready to use until everything has been initialized successfully.

briefdescription.para: This function instructs the Virtual Socket Manager to enter the shutdown state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to restart a Virtual Socket Manager in shutdown if the Virtual Socket has not been modified during shutdown.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.

memberdef.argsstring: (XPrc *InstancePtr, u16 VsmId, u8 Full, u16 RmId)
memberdef.name: XPrc_SendRestartWithStatusCommand

briefdescription.para: This function is used to restart a Virtual Socket Manager in shutdown if the Virtual Socket has been modified during shutdown.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.
= 0, if Virtual Socket is empty, Full = 1, if Virtual Socket is full.
is the identifier of the Reconfigurable Module loaded while the VSM was in shutdown.

briefdescription.para: This function instructs the Virtual Socket Manager to proceed with processing the Reconfigurable Module.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.

memberdef.argsstring: (XPrc *InstancePtr, u16 VsmId, u8 Rm_Shutdown_Req, u8 Rm_Decouple, u8 Sw_Shutdown_Req, u8 Sw_Startup_Req, u8 Rm_Reset)
memberdef.name: XPrc_SendUserControlCommand

briefdescription.para: This function is used to set the values of Rm_Shutdown_Req, Rm_Decouple, Sw_Shutdown_Req, Sw_Startup_Req, Rm_Reset signals.

detaileddescription.para: It can only be used when the VSM is in the shutdown state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.
=> Set to 1 to inform the RM Reconfigurable Module that it is to be removed.
=> Set to 1 to enable any external Virtual Socket decoupling logic.
=> Set to 1 to inform software that the active Reconfigurable Module is to be removed.
=> Set to 1 to inform software that the new Reconfigurable Module has been loaded
=> Reset signal from the IP to the RM.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to read the VSM's Status Register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.

simplesect.para: Returns the contents of the VSM's status register.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to identify whether a VSM is in the Shutdown state or not.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is an identifier of the VSM to access or a pre-read status word.

listitem.para: XPRC_SR_SHUTDOWN_ON when VSM is in Shutdown State.
XPRC_SR_SHUTDOWN_OFF when VSM is not in Shutdown State.

simplesect.para: There are two modes of operation. If InstancePtr is NULL then VsmIdOrStatus contains a previously read status value. Just decode it. If InstancePtr is not NULL then read a fresh status value.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to get a VSM's state.

detaileddescription.para:
Each VSM exist in two states 1. Active State
Shutdown State

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is an identifier of the VSM to access or a pre-read status word.

simplesect.para: There are two modes of operation. If InstancePtr is NULL then VsmIdOrStatus contains a previously read status value. Just decode it. If InstancePtr is not NULL then read a fresh status value.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to get a VSM's Error Status.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is an identifier of the VSM to access or a pre-read status word.

listitem.para: Error code if there is an error.

simplesect.para: There are two modes of operation. If InstancePtr is NULL then VsmIdOrStatus contains a previously read status value. Just decode it. If InstancePtr is not NULL then read a fresh status value.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to extract the identifier of a Reconfigurable Module from a VSM's status register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access or a pre-read status word.

simplesect.para: There are two modes of operation. If InstancePtr is NULL then VsmIdOrStatus contains a previously read status value. Just decode it. If InstancePtr is not NULL then read a fresh status value.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to extract the identifier of a Bitstream from a VSM's status register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access or a pre-read status word.

simplesect.para: There are two modes of operation. If InstancePtr is NULL then VsmIdOrStatus contains a previously read status value. Just decode it. If InstancePtr is not NULL then read a fresh status value.

briefdescription.para: This function sends a software trigger to a Virtual Socket Manager.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.
is the trigger to send.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to find out if there is a Software Trigger pending in a VSM.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.
is a pointer to a variable that will hold the trigger ID that's in the register. This is the last trigger written to the register and may or may not still be pending.

listitem.para: XPRC_SW_TRIGGER_PENDING(1) if software trigger is pending
XPRC_NO_SW_TRIGGER_PENDING(0) if software trigger is not pending.

memberdef.argsstring: (XPrc *InstancePtr, u16 VsmId, u16 TriggerId, u16 RmId)
memberdef.name: XPrc_SetTriggerToRmMapping

briefdescription.para: This function is used to set a Trigger to Reconfigurable Module mapping in a Virtual Socket Manager.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.
specifies the trigger to modify.
specifies Reconfigurable Module to load when trigger TriggerId occurs.

briefdescription.para: This function gets a Trigger to Reconfigurable Module mapping in a Virtual Socket Manager.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.
specifies the trigger to query.

simplesect.para: The identifier of the Reconfigurable Module that will be loaded when trigger TriggerId occurs.

memberdef.argsstring: (XPrc *InstancePtr, u16 VsmId, u16 RmId, u16 BsIndex)
memberdef.name: XPrc_SetRmBsIndex

briefdescription.para: This function sets the BS_INDEX field in the RM_BS_INDEX register to specify which row of the Bitstream Information tables holds the partial bitstream for the Reconfigurable Module in the Virtual Socket Manager.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.
is the identifier of the Reconfigurable Module.
is the row number in the Bitstream Information register bank that holds information about the partial bitstream for the Reconfigurable Module.

simplesect.para: This overwrites the entire BS Index register so care is required in Ultrascale parts where clearing bitstreams are required. In those parts, use this first and then call XPrc_SetRmClearingBsIndex.

memberdef.argsstring: (XPrc *InstancePtr, u16 VsmId, u16 RmId, u16 ClearingBsIndex)
memberdef.name: XPrc_SetRmClearingBsIndex

briefdescription.para: This function set the CLEAR_BS_INDEX field in the RM_BS_INDEX register to specify which row of the BS Information tables holds the clearing bitstream for the Reconfigurable Module in the Virtual Socket Manager.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.
is the identifier of the Reconfigurable Module. bitstream.
is the row number in the Bitstream Information register bank that holds information about the clearing bitstream for the Reconfigurable Module.

simplesect.para: This is only needed when the device being managed is an UltraScale device. This must be called after XPrc_SetRmBsIndex

briefdescription.para: This function get the BS_INDEX field from the RM_BS_INDEX register for the Reconfigurable Module in the Virtual Socket Manager.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.
is the identifier of the Reconfigurable Module.

simplesect.para: Returns BS_INDEX. This is the row number in the Bitstream Information register bank that holds information about the partial bitstream for the Reconfigurable Module.

briefdescription.para: This function get the CLEAR_BS_INDEX field from the RM_BS_INDEX register for the Reconfigurable Module in the Virtual Socket Manager.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.
is the identifier of the Reconfigurable Module.

simplesect.para: Returns CLEAR_BS_INDEX. This is the row number in the Bitstream Information register bank that holds information about the clearing bitstream for the Reconfigurable Module.
This is only needed when the device being managed is an UltraScale device.

memberdef.argsstring: (XPrc *InstancePtr, u16 VsmId, u16 RmId, u8 ShutdownRequired, u8 StartupRequired, u8 ResetRequired, u8 ResetDuration)
memberdef.name: XPrc_SetRmControl

briefdescription.para: This function set the control information for Reconfigurable Module.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.
is the identifier of the Reconfigurable Module.

value for the Reconfigurable Module.
XPRC_RM_CR_NO_SHUTDOWN_REQUIRED(00): No Reconfigurable Module shutdown is required.
XPRC_RM_CR_HW_SHUTDOWN_REQUIRED(01) : Hardware Reconfigurable Module shutdown is required.
XPRC_RM_CR_HW_SW_SHUTDOWN_REQUIRED(10) : Hardware then software shutdown is required.
XPRC_RM_CR_SW_HW_SHUTDOWN_REQUIRED(11) : Software then hardware shutdown is required.

value for the Reconfigurable Module.
XPRC_RM_CR_STARTUP_NOT_REQUIRED (0) : No start-up is required
XPRC_RM_CR_SW_STARTUP_REQUIRED (1) : Software start-up is required.

value for the Reconfigurable Module.
XPRC_RM_CR_NO_RESET_REQUIRED(00): No Reconfigurable Module Reset is required.
01: RESERVED.
XPRC_RM_CR_LOW_RESET_REQUIRED(10) : Active-Low Reconfigurable Module reset is required.
XPRC_RM_CR_HIGH_RESET_REQUIRED(11) : Active-High Reconfigurable Module reset is required.
value for the Reconfigurable Module. The maximum reset duration is 256 clock cycles.

memberdef.argsstring: (XPrc *InstancePtr, u16 VsmId, u16 RmId, u8 *ShutdownRequired, u8 *StartupRequired, u8 *ResetRequired, u8 *ResetDuration)
memberdef.name: XPrc_GetRmControl

briefdescription.para: This function get the control information for Reconfigurable Module.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.
is the identifier of the Reconfigurable Module.

value for the Reconfigurable Module.
XPRC_RM_CR_NO_SHUTDOWN_REQUIRED(00): No Reconfigurable Module shutdown is required.
XPRC_RM_CR_HW_SHUTDOWN_REQUIRED(01) : Hardware Reconfigurable Module shutdown is required.
XPRC_RM_CR_HW_SW_SHUTDOWN_REQUIRED(10) : Hardware then software shutdown is required.
XPRC_RM_CR_SW_HW_SHUTDOWN_REQUIRED(11) : Software then hardware shutdown is required.

value for the Reconfigurable Module.
XPRC_RM_CR_STARTUP_NOT_REQUIRED (0) : No start-up is required
XPRC_RM_CR_SW_STARTUP_REQUIRED (1) : Software start-up is required.

value for the Reconfigurable Module.
XPRC_RM_CR_NO_RESET_REQUIRED(00): No Reconfigurable Module Reset is required.
01: RESERVED.
XPRC_RM_CR_LOW_RESET_REQUIRED(10) : Active-Low Reconfigurable Module reset is required.
XPRC_RM_CR_HIGH_RESET_REQUIRED(11) : Active-High Reconfigurable Module reset is required.
value for the Reconfigurable Module. The maximum reset duration is 256 clock cycles.

memberdef.argsstring: (XPrc *InstancePtr, u16 VsmId, u16 BsIndex, u16 BsId)
memberdef.name: XPrc_SetBsId

briefdescription.para: This function sets the Bitstream Identifier.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.
is the row number in the Bitstream Information register bank that holds information about the bitstream.
is the identifier of the bitstream referenced by BsIndex.

simplesect.para: When the device being managed is 7 Series or UltraScale+, BsID can only be 0. When the device being managed is UltraScale, BsID can be 0 or 1

briefdescription.para: This function get the Bitstream Identifier.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.
is the row number in the Bitstream Information register bank that holds information about the bitstream.

simplesect.para: BsId, which is the identifier of the bitstream referenced by BsIndex.
When the device being managed is 7 Series or UltraScale+, BsID can only be 0. When the device being managed is UltraScale, BsID can be 0 or 1

memberdef.argsstring: (XPrc *InstancePtr, u16 VsmId, u16 BsIndex, u32 BsSize)
memberdef.name: XPrc_SetBsSize

briefdescription.para: This function sets the Bitstream size in bytes.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.
is the row number in the Bitstream Information register bank that holds information about the bitstream.
is the bitstream size in bytes.

briefdescription.para: This function get the Bitstream size in bytes.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.
is the row number in the Bitstream Information register bank that holds information about the bitstream.

memberdef.argsstring: (XPrc *InstancePtr, u16 VsmId, u16 BsIndex, u32 BsAddress)
memberdef.name: XPrc_SetBsAddress

briefdescription.para: This function sets the Address of the Bitstream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.
is the row number in the Bitstream Information register bank that holds information about the bitstream.
is the address of the bitstream in memory.

briefdescription.para: This function get the Address of the Bitstream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.
is the row number in the Bitstream Information register bank that holds information about the bitstream.

simplesect.para: The address of the bitstream in memory

memberdef.argsstring: (XPrc *InstancePtr, u32 VsmId, u8 RegisterType, u16 TableRow)
memberdef.name: XPrc_GetRegisterAddress

briefdescription.para: The register offsets for the PRC are dynamic.

detaileddescription.para: These could become awkward to use as each Trigger, VS, RM and BS require their own registers so looking up hard wired names would be clumsy. For example a reference to a constant PRC_VS3_TRIGGER7 would be difficult to generate in a loop that iterated over each VS and Trigger.

This function gets the address offset for a register in the PRC. As this is a Direct Hardware Interface, it cannot use device configuration parameters, and multiple instances are supported through the base address.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is the identifier of the VSM to access.
is the type of register(XPRC_STATUS_REG, XPRC_CONTROL_REG, XPRC_SW_TRIGGER_REG, XPRC_TRIGGER_REG, etc)
is the row of the table(trigger_id, rm_id, rm_bs_index).

briefdescription.para: This function is used to Print the VSM Status.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the PRC instance.
is an identifier of the VSM to access or a pre-read status word.
is a text string that will prefix each line of output.

briefdescription.para: This function runs a self-test on the PRC driver.

detaileddescription.para: This self test reads from the status register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XPrc instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the test is successful.
